acquisition_contract_for_v2_14c.purpose: Acquire official Xetra downloads page and discover T7 XETR all tradable instruments links.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_14c.allowed_in_v2_14c: HTTP GET raw HTML only, preserve bytes, compute SHA256, record links.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_14c.prohibited_in_v2_14c: No parsing acceptance, no normalization, no net-new filtering, no rebuild, no scoring.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_14c.raw_preservation_policy: Save raw HTML exactly as received under raw/deutsche_boerse_xetra_v2_14c/.

acquisition_contract_for_v2_14c.purpose: Acquire official all tradable instruments page for provenance and discovery.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_14c.allowed_in_v2_14c: HTTP GET raw HTML only, preserve bytes, compute SHA256, record candidate links.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_14c.prohibited_in_v2_14c: No accepted filtering, no row normalization, no rebuild.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_14c.raw_preservation_policy: Save raw HTML exactly as received under raw/deutsche_boerse_xetra_v2_14c/.

acquisition_contract_for_v2_14c.url_or_discovery_rule: Discover only from official Deutsche Börse Xetra pages. Expected label: T7 (XETR) All tradable instruments.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_14c.purpose: Acquire official XETR all tradable instruments file as raw bytes if a direct official link is discovered.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_14c.allowed_in_v2_14c: Download only official direct file links discovered from official pages; preserve exact bytes and hashes.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_14c.prohibited_in_v2_14c: No parsing acceptance, no instrument type decisions, no rebuild.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_14c.raw_preservation_policy: Save raw file exactly as received under raw/deutsche_boerse_xetra_v2_14c/datasets/.

acquisition_contract_for_v2_14c.purpose: Acquire official shares reference page as shares-only fallback/provenance source.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_14c.allowed_in_v2_14c: HTTP GET raw HTML only; no dynamic scraping unless explicitly approved later.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_14c.prohibited_in_v2_14c: No fragile UI scraping, no accepted row extraction, no rebuild.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_14c.raw_preservation_policy: Save raw HTML exactly as received under raw/deutsche_boerse_xetra_v2_14c/.

acquisition_contract_for_v2_14c.url_or_discovery_rule: Derived only during v2.14D from official source fields.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_14c.purpose: Prevent inclusion of ETFs, ETCs, ETNs, active ETFs, funds, bonds, certificates and other non-common-equity instruments.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_14c.allowed_in_v2_14c: Record raw files and metadata only.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_14c.prohibited_in_v2_14c: No shares/equity acceptance decision during acquisition.

acquisition_contract_for_v2_14c.url_or_discovery_rule: Compare only during v2.14D against expanded_universe_v2_13e.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_14c.purpose: Xetra likely overlaps with Cboe Europe and must be baseline-compared before rebuild.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_14c.prohibited_in_v2_14c: No net-new filtering in acquisition phase.
acquisition_contract_for_v2_14c.raw_preservation_policy: Raw official files remain source of truth.

validation_questions_for_v2_14d.question: Does the official Xetra downloads page expose a direct T7 XETR all tradable instruments file?
Is the downloaded file CSV, ZIP, XLSX or another structured format?
Which fields provide ISIN, WKN, mnemonic/symbol, name, currency, market and instrument type?
How many gross instruments are present before filtering?
How many are shares/equities versus ETFs, ETCs, ETNs, active ETFs, funds, bonds, certificates or other instruments?
How many share/equity candidates are net-new against expanded_universe_v2_13e?
How much overlap exists with existing Cboe Europe reference data?
Can the provider be normalized conservatively without brittle scraping?
Does Xetra materially reduce the remaining 13,137-row gap to 50k?
Should Xetra be source provider, candidate provider, enrichment/reference-only or fallback/deferred?
